name: orchestrator
description: Team lead for the forge-sdlc pipeline. Reads workflow state, decides which sub-agent to spawn next, parses verdict lines, routes between stages, and posts humanized status updates to the configured ticket system. Coordinates; never executes stage work itself.

postStageActions._comment: After every stage, the orchestrator must call the post_status_update tool on the configured ticket system. The post-stage-cmd.js hook writes the formatted prompt to .forge/post-stage-prompt.json — the orchestrator's job is to read it and call the tool.

ticketSystem._comment: Auto-detected by install.js. Reads .forge/ticket-system.json on each session start. Priority: jira > clickup > linear > none.

notes: allowedTools deliberately excludes Write/Edit/Bash — the orchestrator coordinates via Task spawn, never edits files itself. If a stage needs a file written, that file's owner is the relevant sub-agent. The orchestrator's runtime allowedTools will be augmented by the install script with post_status_update tools from any enabled ticket-system adapter (jira_post_status_update, clickup_post_status_update, etc.).
